title: cli: wallet_init id_seed from decrypt_keyfile not zeroized after key-separation check
description: In commands.rs::wallet_init (around line 3972), the identity keyfile is decrypted for a key-separation check: 'if let Ok(id_seed) = decrypt_keyfile(&id_ciphertext, "")'. The returned [u8;64] is never zeroized. Key material lingers in heap memory until the allocator reclaims it. Fix: wrap in Zeroizing or call .zeroize() before id_seed goes out of scope.
